title: Plugin sig enforcement: integration tests for install_from_marketplace_with_policy
description: install_from_marketplace_with_policy() (added in #249 Phase 1) enforces RequireSignature via enforce_signature_policy(). The unit-level verify_signature tests are in validate.rs (28 tests, all green). Manager-level integration tests need TempDir fixtures with real ed25519 keys. Scope: 5 tests covering unsigned+RequireSignature->UnsignedPlugin, signed+trusted->success, signed+untrusted->UnknownSigner, tampered->UnknownSigner, no-policy->no-op. Refs: src/plugins/manager.rs install_from_marketplace_with_policy, crosslink #249 parent, #521 related.
